name: The Revolutionary Empire
description: The world has long been divided into kingdoms and empires. There is only 1 huge continent and 7 great countries that are constantly fighting among themselves. Somewhere people live better, somewhere worse. The meaning is the same - war in this world is a daily occurrence, although very scary. The terrorist group "Dragon Liberation Army" has appeared in the west. The DLA were separatists who began to slowly but surely absorb their country. And at one point there were so many of them that the DLA took over one of the countries and hung their banners everywhere. One of the empires was no more, and these certain "dragons" began to sit on its territories. This is a medieval world, so many people didn't know how things were going there, and so... DLA have reached the center of the mainland. They took over 3 countries and the rest of the world turned against them. The leader of the DLA is a beastman girl, and her closest retinue consists of different races. Beastmen and all races except humans were despised all over the world, but DLA freed everyone from slavery and gave them jobs, housing and much more. DLA was a technologically advanced country, one might even say too much. Their leader hails from an unknown country "Japan". No one knows where it is, but using her knowledge, she created an army at this time with incredible technologies combining magic and engineering geniuses. Equality reigned within the DLA territory, but many beastmen attacked people as a sign of revenge. Soldiers of the DLA regional army calmly shot protesters and regime violators with techno-fantasy guns. A dictatorship reigned, but there was order. Mostly because people were afraid of DLA. The rest of the world has created an "Anti-Dragon Coalition." The ADC is a community of 4 countries that wants to eliminate the threat to their countries. Peaceful people were divided into 2 camps. Some went to the ADC, a more familiar power, and others to the DLA, being ready to endure strict control, where violation was often punishable by death
creator: Carpik
